sections.title: Pro Set Champions Dual Autographs Red
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Yellow #/5 or less, Green #/3 or 1/1, Navy 1/1, Platinum 1/1. · PSC-01 Lanny McDonald / Doug Gilmour #/ 15 PSC-02 Mark Messier / Grant Fuhr #/ 15 PSC-03 Mario Lemieux / Jaromír Jágr #/ 12 PSC-04 Mike Bossy / Bryan Trottier #/ 15 PSC-05 Frank Mahovlich / Red Kelly #/ 20 PSC-06 Gordie Howe / Ted Lindsay #/ 9 PSC-07 Bobby Hull / Glenn Hall #/ 20 PSC-08 Mike Modano / Brett Hull #/ 15 - Redemption PSC-09 Mark Messier / Mike Richter #/ 15 PSC-10 Larry Murphy / Igor Larionov #/ 20 PSC-11 Gerry Cheevers / Johnny Bucyk #/ 20 PSC-12 Joe Sakic / Peter Forsberg #/ 15
